## 📋 Checklist

### ✅ Requirements Checklist
- [ ] All 4 UCs completed
- [ ] `agents.md` files created for all UCs
- [ ] `skills.md` files created for all UCs
- [ ] `classifier.py` runs and produces output
- [ ] `app.py` files run without crashes (UC-0B, UC-0C, UC-X)
- [ ] `growth_output.csv` present (UC-0C)
- [ ] `summary_*.txt` files present (UC-0B)
- [ ] 4+ commits with proper messages
- [ ] PR template fully completed

### ✅ Quality Checklist
- [ ] Code is well-commented and readable
- [ ] Error handling is implemented
- [ ] Output formats are correct
- [ ] Solutions are scalable and maintainable
- [ ] Documentation is complete
